prompt: RBAC policy: owner allows everything. admin allows everything EXCEPT org/billing resources. editor and viewer are denied org/billing entirely. Question: does a 'viewer' principal get the 'read' action on the 'billing' resource? Respond with exactly one lowercase word and nothing else: allow or deny.
notes: Single-hop policy reasoning with a known answer (billing is owner-only). Deterministic. Catches a regression where a prompt/model change degrades careful instruction-following ('one word only').
